MAP.COMMENT: --- Check if incoming batchJobName is present in disabled list ---

Values.value: Scheduler Details unable to log and VPF API PUT call failure: as no batchID to update

INVOKE.COMMENT: convert response string to response doc

Values.value: Scheduler Details logged and VPF API call completed successfully: URL: %url%

INVOKE.COMMENT: convert response string to response doc

Values.value: Scheduler Details unable to log and VPF API call failure: URL: %url%Error: %errorMessage%, %header/statusMessage%
